Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 180 

SR_SPLMTL_MH_2_CD 

LABEL: Supplemental HRSN Mental Health 2: Feeling Down, Depressed, or Hopeless 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) mental health where patient is 
feeling down, depressed, or hopeless. 

LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_MH_2_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Not at all 
1 = Several days 
2
